currentNode.title: Update architecture docs & PR
currentNode.summary: Updated the architecture docs to mention that the SQLite store operates in WAL mode. Created PR #452 to merge the stability improvements into main. All CI checks passed successfully.

recentSteps.title: Investigate Memory DB Timeouts
recentSteps.summary:
Identified that the memory SQLite vector queries occasionally timeout when concurrently writing large batch payloads due to the default journal mode.

Solution: Enable WAL mode and implement an exponential backoff retry mechanism for databa

recentSteps.title: Implement DB write backoff
Run concurrency load tests
recentSteps.summary:
Executed the full load test suite `npm run bench:load`.

Results:
- Success rate: 100%
- Timeout errors: 0
- Writes per second: increased by 45%

The exponential backoff mechanism fully resolved the SQLite locking contention!
